channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Trump discusses US-Iran negotiations via intermediaries in Pakistan amid threat of escalation
item.description: US President Donald Trump made statements indicating that Iran could be targeted in a single night, specifying that such action might occur as soon as tomorrow. At the same time, he mentioned that Vic...

item.title: ADC accuses INEC of blocking party from fielding 2027 election candidates
item.description: The African Democratic Congress (ADC) don raise alarm say Independent National Electoral Commission (INEC) dey try put wahala for their way to stop dem from fielding candidates for 2027 elections. Acc...

item.title: AI-Generated Images Replacing Real Photos on Google Reviews for Major Australian Stores
item.description: In recent days, a bizarre issue has been circulating on Google reviews for major Australian stores like Bunnings, IKEA, Target, Kmart, and Big W, where AI-generated images are replacing the real store...

item.title: Kanye West's UK Performance Faces Scrutiny as Sponsors Withdraw and Calls for Ban Grow
item.description: Kanye West’s planned performances at London’s Wireless Festival are facing significant backlash and scrutiny, prompting a review of his permission to enter the UK by government ministers. Following nu...

item.title: 7 memorable Beyoncé impersonations on 'Your Face Sounds Familiar' that you should watch
item.description: In this article, we look back at some of the most impressive Beyoncé performances featured on the Filipino TV show ‘Your Face Sounds Familiar.’ The show, known for its celebrity contestants impersonat...

item.title: LiveBarn, Montreal Sports Streaming Platform, Attracts $400 Million Investment
item.description: Montreal-based LiveBarn, a company specializing in livestreaming amateur and youth sports games, has secured a significant US$400-million investment from U.S. private equity firm GTCR, LLC. The deal, ...

item.title: Courtney Lawes to return to England after two years at Brive
item.description: Courtney Lawes, the 37-year-old former England captain, has confirmed he will leave French Pro D2 side Brive at the conclusion of the current season, marking his return to English rugby. Lawes spent t...

item.title: New Implant and Motorized Glove Could Help Stroke Patients Regain Hand Function
item.description: Stroke is a leading cause of long-term disability, often leaving survivors with permanent hand and arm impairments. Epia Neuro, a San Francisco-based startup, is developing a brain-computer interface ...

item.title: China’s zero-tariff policy offers Kenya new trade prospects if business reforms are strengthened
item.description: Chinese Ambassador to Kenya Guo Haiyan has urged Kenya to sharpen its business environment and back its exporters so as to take full advantage of China’s upcoming zero-tariff treatment for African goo...

item.title: Kaizer Chiefs fight back to beat Orbit College 3–1 in Gqeberha
item.description: Kaizer Chiefs produced a spirited comeback to defeat Orbit College 3–1 in their DStv Premiership clash at the Nelson Mandela Bay Stadium in Gqeberha. The match began with Orbit showing early dominance...

item.title: Victor Wanyama: A career that ended prematurely with Harambee Stars
item.description: Victor Wanyama’s career with Harambee Stars was one filled with promise, but it ended earlier than many expected. Debuting at just 15 years old in 2007, Wanyama represented Kenya for over a decade, ma...

item.title: Virgin Australia flight attendant Lucinta Evans dies in Fiji road accident
item.description: Australian flight attendant Lucinta Evans, who had just turned 28, tragically lost her life in a road incident in Nadi, Fiji, on 28 March. Evans, a beloved Virgin Australia crew member, is remembered ...

item.title: Independent review completed into police restraint death of Aboriginal man in Alice Springs
item.description: Nearly a year after the death of 24‑year‑old Aboriginal man Kumanjayi White, an external police review into the use of force by two Northern Territory officers who restrained him has concluded. Mr Whi...

item.title: Amapiano Artists Thatohatsi and Tracy Recovering After Car Accident
item.description: Popular amapiano artists Thatohatsi and Tracy, along with members of their road team, were involved in a car accident earlier this Sunday. The incident included driver Thabiso, DJ Seun1401 and road ma...

item.title: US military carries out daring rescue of airman from Iranian territory
item.description: A tense and complex US rescue mission took place after an F15E Strike Eagle fighter jet was shot down by Iranian air defences over Isfahan province. The pilot was rescued, but the second crew member, ...

item.title: NTR police initiate 30-day campaign to combat drug smuggling and addiction
item.description: In an effort to combat the rising drug menace, the NTR Commissionerate police launched the 'Drugs Pai Dandayatra 2.0' on April 6, 2026. The program aims to prevent the smuggling and sale of drugs and ...

item.title: Pretoria Police Captain Suspended Over Alleged Misappropriation of SAPS Travel Funds
item.description: A Pretoria-based police captain in the South African Police Service (SAPS) Protection Security Services has been suspended following allegations of misappropriating millions of rand intended for trave...

item.title: Balancing Protection and Freedom: How Fencing Shapes Africa’s Wildlife Parks
item.description: This article talk about one major debate wey dey happen for wildlife conservation across Africa — whether national parks suppose dey fenced or make dem open. The researchers study 60 parks across 17 A...

item.title: Study Shows Growth in Upper Middle-Class Incomes Over Decades
item.description: Recent research indicates that a larger proportion of Americans are now earning upper-middle-class incomes compared to previous decades. According to a report by the American Enterprise Institute, rou...

item.title: Raghav Chadha shares a reflective message amid internal tensions in AAP
item.description: The NDTV article, titled 'Never Outshine The Master: Raghav Chadha’s Cryptic Post Amid AAP Row', reports on a social media post shared by Aam Aadmi Party (AAP) leader Raghav Chadha during a period of ...
